displayName: NVIDIA Blackwell / CUDA Docker runtime setup
description: Profile for RTX 50 / Blackwell systems. The preferred user path is one runtime image containing CUDA, PyTorch, FlashAttention, xformers, ComfyUI, ComfyUI-Trellis2 and TRELLIS2 models. Unity and DINOv3 stay outside the image.

installables.name: Asset Factory Blackwell runtime image
installables.role: Prebuilt Docker runtime for the heavy local generation stack: CUDA, PyTorch, FlashAttention, xformers, ComfyUI, ComfyUI-Trellis2 and TRELLIS2 models. Excludes Unity and DINOv3.
installables.officialSource: Docker image from ASSET_FACTORY_RUNTIME_IMAGE, or local build from docker/runtime/Dockerfile.blackwell using official upstream sources.
installables.licenseNote: The image includes external tools and models. Verify all licenses, model cards, access terms and redistribution rules before publishing or using commercially.

commands.fallback: If no published image is configured, build locally from docker/runtime/Dockerfile.blackwell. Unity and DINOv3 remain manual/external.

installables.name: TRELLIS2 Blackwell workaround
installables.role: Compatibility patch path for Blackwell GPUs when official dependency wheels are not yet compatible.
installables.licenseNote: Review the repository license and verify each patch against official TRELLIS2/ComfyUI-Trellis2 updates before use.

commands.fallback: Use manual patch review if automatic patching is not appropriate.

installables.validation: Record applied commit and run ComfyUI-Trellis2 import test.
